title: VibeMon Hook Envelope v2
description: Wire format that notify.sh POSTs to /functions/v1/hook. The server (vibemon-app) must accept any document conforming to this schema; new optional fields can be added without bumping v.

v.description: Envelope version. Bump only when the contract breaks backward compatibility.

event.description: Logical event name. activity = file edit (Edit/Write/NotebookEdit), bash = Bash tool use (no drops).

agent.description: Source agent that fired the hook.

session_id.description: Agent's session identifier. Used for multi-session rate limiting and timeline reconstruction.

cwd.description: Working directory at hook fire time.

project_root.description: Best-effort project identifier. owner/repo from git remote, or basename of git toplevel, or empty.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601. Set by notify.sh, not the agent.

local_hour.description: Hour-of-day in the user's local timezone.

local_tz.description: tzinfo string (e.g. 'Asia/Seoul', 'KST'). Server persists to profiles.timezone.

payload.description: Sanitized agent payload. Body content stripped — only safe meta keys remain.

signals.description: Sparse derived behavioral signals. All keys are optional; categories are open-ended (server stores unknown keys verbatim into hook_events.signals JSONB).

bash.category.description: Categorized first-token group. Open-ended; common values listed for reference.

bash.head.description: First whitespace-delimited token of the command (capped to 32 chars).

bash.byte_len.description: Original command byte length (the body itself is NEVER sent).
